label: Human
description: Flexible baseline identity that can express duty, ambition, or freedom depending on context.

label: Elf
description: Refined, ancient, graceful, and often arcane-coded.

label: Half-Orc
description: Intense, durable, intimidating, and physically forceful.

label: Tiefling
description: Charismatic outsider marked by infernal or dark mystique.

label: Dragonborn
description: Proud, forceful, noble, and visibly powerful.

label: Halfling
description: Small but resilient, clever, and subtly capable.

label: Gnome
description: Curious, clever, tinkering, and often magically inclined.

label: Aasimar
description: Radiant, noble, purpose-driven, and divinely coded.

label: Goblin
description: Chaotic survivor with speed, cunning, and outsider energy.

label: Firbolg
description: Gentle giant of the wild, rooted in primal calm and hidden strength.
